description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized horse standing in a natural pose, with its head slightly bowed and one front leg raised. The horse is adorned with an ornate saddle featuring detailed patterns and tassels, suggesting ceremonial or decorative use. The surface has a dark, weathered patina, giving the impression of aged bronze or metal. The musculature and anatomical features of the horse are realistically rendered, with attention to the mane, ears, and facial expression. The tail is sculpted in a relaxed, natural position, and the overall form is robust and solid. There are no visible openings or interactive elements, and the sculpture appears to be a single, continuous piece.
description: A life-sized, dark-patinated horse sculpture with ornate saddle and realistic anatomical details, standing in a natural pose.
description_view_0: This view shows the left side and front of the horse, highlighting the detailed saddle and the horse's bowed head.
description_view_1: The rear and right side of the horse are visible, emphasizing the tail, hindquarters, and the saddle's decorative patterns.
description_view_2: The right side and front of the horse are shown, with clear visibility of the raised front leg and the horse's facial features.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the horse, focusing on the head, ears, and the symmetry of the front legs.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
